label: Job giver pick up opportunistic weapon
description: Directs the pawn to pick up a nearby weapon it can use. Inherits all base ThinkNode fields.

pickUpUtilityItems.label: Pick up utility items
pickUpUtilityItems.description: If true, the pawn also considers utility equipment (e.g. grenades) in addition to weapons.

preferBuildingDestroyers.label: Prefer building destroyers
preferBuildingDestroyers.description: If true, the pawn prefers weapons effective against buildings (e.g. incendiary or explosive) when choosing.
